arts.ttl: Latest Anfield change exposes Liverpool problem that even Paul Merson noticed
arts.sum: Anfield played host to a record league crowd on Saturday but it was Nottingham Forest fans who were left cheering

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Virgil van Dijk issues Reds warning as John Barnes makes contract statement
arts.sum: Liverpool leader Virgil van Dijk insists they must use their surprise loss to Nottingham Forest as a mental reset and get their season back on track as Arne Slot deals with a first Reds loss

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes sends three-word message after Liverpool defeat to Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes was impressed by one player in Nottingham Forest's 1-0 win over Liverpool on Saturday

arts.ttl: Liverpool could now make five changes for Champions League clash at AC Milan
arts.sum: Liverpool are next up against AC Milan in the Champions League with Arne Slot facing some selection posers

arts.ttl: Thiago tips Liverpool midfielder for breakout season after impressive start to Arne Slot era
arts.sum: "Sometimes as a number six, you can see he is very flowing through midfield and it's pretty good to see how he is involving himself and adapting to that position. Thiago, who called time on his playing career during the summer following the expiration of his contract at Anfield, returned to Merseyside for Saturday's 1-0 defeat to Nottingham Forest to catch his first glimpse of life under new manager Arne Slot.

arts.ttl: Milan optimistic in negotiations with Maignan for contract extension
arts.sum: Milan are reportedly growing increasingly confident that goalkeeper Mike Maignan will commit to a new...

arts.ttl: Roberto Firmino heartbreak as former Liverpool teammate scores 99th-minute equaliser
arts.sum: Former Liverpool winger Sadio Mane moved to the Saudi Pro League last summer and netted a late goal as his Al Nassr side drew with Roberto Firmino's Al-Ahli
